name: scheduled-agents
description: Run a saved agent on a recurring interval. A 5-min cron claims due enabled schedules (bounded 50, OCC-safe via lastRunAt claim-stamp) and runs each through the SAME callForUser pipeline as a normal agent run (`agent/<id>` model ref). Runs AS the creator, spending that workspace's creds; interval floored at 15 min.
notes: v0.1 = CRUD + a 5-min sweep. Cron: crons.interval('run due agent schedules', { minutes: 5 }, internal.scheduledAgentsRun.runDue, {}). runDue lives in a 'use node' module (scheduledAgentsRun.ts) so it can import callForUser; the DB halves (_claimDue/_markRun) stay in the default-runtime scheduledAgents.ts. Spend is bounded by the enabled-gate + 15-min interval floor + 50-row claim cap. SECURITY: schedules run AS their creator under that creator's creds — create requires you own the agent; toggle/remove require you be the creator or a ws admin. `agent/<id>` resolves the agent's fixed model (agent instructions/tools are applied by callForUser's own settings path, not re-injected here).
